task: Develop Multi-Model Factory architecture and upgrade Node logic to LangChain abstractions

key_patterns_discovered: When integrating proprietary 2026 test-time compute kwargs (e.g., Anthropic's 'thinking' or Google's 'thinkingConfig'), utilizing `bind({ ...<any> })` ensures arbitrary parameter mapping to native LLM requests without breaking strict generic TS `BaseChatModel` validation bindings.

Zod schemas targeting `.withStructuredOutput` MUST have verbose `.describe()` tags on every property; without it, non-Google SDK wrappers hallucinate or omit keys during the structured extraction process.
corrections: Addressed TS2353 and TS2589 by dynamically suppressing excessively deep LangChain Zod tool union mapping and enforcing explicit typings on factory instances.
